languages.text: Reactivate now gives 5 Momentum to each party member alive.

traits.locale_text: Reactivate now gives 5 Momentum to each party member alive.

languages.text: Whenever the Overseer uses {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Reactivate{/g}, the momentum value is increased by +5 for each party member still in combat.

traits.locale_text: Whenever the Overseer uses {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Reactivate{/g}, the momentum value is increased by +5 for each party member still in combat.
Whenever the Overseer uses {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Reactivate{/g}, the momentum value is increased by +5 for each party member still in combat.
Whenever the Overseer uses {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Reactivate{/g}, the momentum value is increased by +5 for each party member still in combat.

languages.text: Когда надзиратель применяет {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Перезапуск{/g}, моментум увеличивается на 5 за каждого члена отряда в сознании.
languages.original_text: Whenever the Overseer uses {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Reactivate{/g}, the momentum value is increased by +5 for each party member still in combat.

traits.locale_text: Когда надзиратель применяет {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Перезапуск{/g}, моментум увеличивается на 5 за каждого члена отряда в сознании.
Когда надзиратель применяет {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Перезапуск{/g}, моментум увеличивается на 5 за каждого члена отряда в сознании.

languages.text: Sinken die Wunden des Vertrauten auf 0, verliert die Gruppe keine Dynamik mehr. {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Reaktivieren{/g} gewährt jetzt +10 Dynamik für jedes Gruppenmitglied, das noch im Kampf ist.
languages.original_text: Whenever the familiar's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} drop to 0, the party no longer loses {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}momentum{/g}. {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Reactivate{/g} now grants +10 momentum for each party member still in combat.

traits.locale_text: Sinken die Wunden des Vertrauten auf 0, verliert die Gruppe keine Dynamik mehr. {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Reaktivieren{/g} gewährt jetzt +10 Dynamik für jedes Gruppenmitglied, das noch im Kampf ist.

Sinken die Wunden des Vertrauten auf 0, verliert die Gruppe keine Dynamik mehr. {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Reaktivieren{/g} gewährt jetzt +10 Dynamik für jedes Gruppenmitglied, das noch im Kampf ist.

Sinken die Wunden des Vertrauten auf 0, verliert die Gruppe keine Dynamik mehr. {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Reaktivieren{/g} gewährt jetzt +10 Dynamik für jedes Gruppenmitglied, das noch im Kampf ist.

languages.text: Le niveau de fougue de chaque membre du groupe encore en combat est augmenté de +5 chaque fois que le surveillant utilise {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Réactivation{/g}.
languages.original_text: Whenever the Overseer uses {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Reactivate{/g}, the momentum value is increased by +5 for each party member still in combat.

traits.locale_text: Le niveau de fougue de chaque membre du groupe encore en combat est augmenté de +5 chaque fois que le surveillant utilise {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Réactivation{/g}.

languages.text: 当监察官使用{g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}重新激活{/g}时，队伍中每有一名仍在战斗的成员，士气就会提高5点。
languages.original_text: Whenever the Overseer uses {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Reactivate{/g}, the momentum value is increased by +5 for each party member still in combat.

traits.locale_text: 当监察官使用{g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}重新激活{/g}时，队伍中每有一名仍在战斗的成员，士气就会提高5点。
当使仆的生命值降为0时，队伍不再损失士气。除此之外，使用{g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}重新激活{/g}时，队伍中每有一名仍在战斗的成员，士气就会提高10点。
当使仆的生命值降为0时，队伍不再损失士气。除此之外，使用{g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}重新激活{/g}时，队伍中每有一名仍在战斗的成员，士气就会提高10点。

languages.text: Cuando el supervisor usa {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Reactivación{/g}, el ímpetu aumenta en +5 por cada miembro del grupo que sigue luchando.
languages.original_text: Whenever the Overseer uses {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Reactivate{/g}, the momentum value is increased by +5 for each party member still in combat.

traits.locale_text: Cuando el supervisor usa {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Reactivación{/g}, el ímpetu aumenta en +5 por cada miembro del grupo que sigue luchando.

Cuando las {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}heridas{/g} del familiar bajan a 0, el grupo ya no pierde {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}ímpetu{/g}. {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Reactivación{/g} ahora otorga +10 de ímpetu a cada miembro del grupo que siga luchando.

Cuando las {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}heridas{/g} del familiar bajan a 0, el grupo ya no pierde {g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}ímpetu{/g}. {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Reactivación{/g} ahora otorga +10 de ímpetu a cada miembro del grupo que siga luchando.

languages.text: 監督官が{g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}再起動{/g}を使用すると、戦闘に残っている部隊メンバー1人につき推進力の値が+5される。
languages.original_text: Whenever the Overseer uses {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Reactivate{/g}, the momentum value is increased by +5 for each party member still in combat.

traits.locale_text: 監督官が{g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}再起動{/g}を使用すると、戦闘に残っている部隊メンバー1人につき推進力の値が+5される。
ファミリアーの{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}傷{/g}が0まで低下すると、部隊メンバーはそれ以上{g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}推進力{/g}を失わなくなる。{g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}再起動{/g}により、戦闘に残っている部隊メンバー1人につき推進力が+10される。
ファミリアーの{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}傷{/g}が0まで低下すると、部隊メンバーはそれ以上{g|Encyclopedia:MomentumWithDetailsGlossary}推進力{/g}を失わなくなる。{g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}再起動{/g}により、戦闘に残っている部隊メンバー1人につき推進力が+10される。

languages.text: Gözetmen, {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Yeniden Başlat{/g} kabiliyetini kullandığında momentum değeri, hâlâ çatışmada bulunan her grup üyesi için +5 artar.
languages.original_text: Whenever the Overseer uses {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Reactivate{/g}, the momentum value is increased by +5 for each party member still in combat.

traits.locale_text: Gözetmen, {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Yeniden Başlat{/g} kabiliyetini kullandığında momentum değeri, hâlâ çatışmada bulunan her grup üyesi için +5 artar.
İyenin sağlık puanı 0'a indiğinde grup artık momentum kaybetmez. {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Yeniden Başlat{/g} artık hâlâ çatışmada bulunan her grup üyesi için +10 momentum kazandırır.
İyenin sağlık puanı 0'a indiğinde grup artık momentum kaybetmez. {g|f:374265cc61d5475898f17ac969795f7c}Yeniden Başlat{/g} artık hâlâ çatışmada bulunan her grup üyesi için +10 momentum kazandırır.
